title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup to v1.14.4
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [rollup](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup) | devDependencies | minor | [`1.13.1` -> `1.14.4`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/rollup/1.13.1/1.14.4) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup</summary>

### [`v1.14.4`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1144)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.14.3...v1.14.4)

_2019-06-07_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Do not omit external re-exports for `moduleSideEffects: false` ([#​2905](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2905))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2905](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2905): Make sure external re-exports are included for moduleSideEffects: false ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.14.3`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1143)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.14.2...v1.14.3)

_2019-06-06_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Generate correct external imports when importing from a directory that would be above the root of the current working directory ([#​2902](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2902))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2902](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2902): Use browser relative path algorithm for chunks ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.14.2`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1142)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.14.1...v1.14.2)

_2019-06-05_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Prevent unnecessary inclusion of external namespace import in certain situations ([#​2900](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2900))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2900](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2900): Handle early bind for member expressions ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.14.1`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1141)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.14.0...v1.14.1)

_2019-06-05_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Fix an issue where try-statements were not included properly when a variable declared inside the statement was accessed outside it ([#​2898](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2898))
-   Fix an issue where `await` expressions were not included properly ([#​2899](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2899))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2898](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2898): Properly include try-catch-statements even if they have already been included in some way ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2899](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2899): Fix unintended early return in await inclusion handling ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.14.0`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1140)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.13.1...v1.14.0)

_2019-06-05_

##### Features

-   Deoptimize code inside and called from try-statements for feature detection ([#​2892](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2892))
-   Tree-shake unused call arguments ([#​2892](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2892))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2892](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2892): Implement try-statement-deoptimization for feature detection, tree-shake unused arguments ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

</details>
